title: Even More Unique
description: Lightweight, Vanilla-like while having many quality of life mods and texture packs.
body:
# Even More Unique

**The EMU modpack looks to provide some of the best performance, quality of life and look mods available, while thinking about looks and even taking inspiration from other modpacks to create a better experience, configured for the maximum performance achievable. it may outperform other look-based modpacks in benchmarks, and when it doesn't, I try my best to make it better.**

**EMU, unlike other performance modpacks, cares about look. This means that there are lots of  enhancements are included in the modpack by itself - you are expected to add any performance mods you want yourself.**


# IMPORTANT

The texture pack "Vanilla Tweaks" can be found at [https://vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/share/#CEmMyu).


**Heavily Inspired by [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop).**





# Extra



<details>
<summary>Included Mods (67)</summary>

Note: This Does not include Libraries!


  
- Acurrate Block Placement Reborn (BE Style Block placement system)
- Ambient Sounds (Adds birds chirping, etc.)
- BadOptimizations (Misc. optimizations)
- Better Clouds (Adds better vanilla-like clouds)
- Better Mount HUD (Improves the ingame HUD while riding a horse, donkey or other mount)
- Better Than Mending (Adds the ability to sneak-right-click a Mending item to repair it with experience you already have)
- Better Third Person (Adds independent rotation of the camera from a third person view)
- Blur + (Adds a Gaussian blur shader to the background of all GUIs)
- Bobby (Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance setting)
- Clumps (Makes XP Orbs a single orb, increases performance by a little bit.)
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric) (Optimizations to chunk loading, generation and saving)
- Continuity (Allows resource packs that use the OptiFine connected textures format to work without Optifine)
- Crawl (Gives you the ability to craw, already in the game by using a trapdoor, but this is better)
- Cubes Without Borders (Makes it so that minecraft runs on a borderless window instead of fullscreen)
- Dynamic Lights (Adds dynamic lights, like Optifine)
- Easy Anvils (Makes anvils better)
- Easy Elytra Takeoff (By looking up and launching a firework, you'll take off)
- Easy Magic (Better enchanting tables)
- Easy Shulker Boxes (Better shulker boxes)
- Enhanced Block Entities (Reimplements block tile entities for a performance boost)
- Entity Culling (Uses path tracing to cull entities which behind walls)
- Essential (Adds LOTS of features)
- Explosive Enhancement (Adds better exploding animations)
- FerriteCore (Memory Usage Optimizations)
- HorseBuff (Adds lots of changes to horses)
- Indium (Needed for EBE's block entity models to look correct when used with Sodium)
- Iris (Shader support)
- Language Reload (Adds quality of life changes related to languages)
- Lithium (Server-Side performance boosts)
- Make Bubbles Pop
- Mod Menu (Displays mods and adds a list for them)
- Model Gap Fix (Fixes the gap in certain models by removing texture zooming)
- ModernFix (Targets load times and memory usage)
- More Culling (Culls more things for performance boost)
- Noisium (Low impact world generation optimizations)
- Nyf's Spiders (Makes spiders better)
- Panda's Falling Tree's (A tree will completely fall if you break the first block)
- Particular (Adds water effects)
- Presence Footsteps (Adds better sounds for walking on surfaces)
- RightClickHarvest (Adds the ability to harvest crops by right clicking)
- Sodium (Main Optimization mod. Engine rewrite)
- Sodium Extra (Extra Options for Sodium)
- Sounds (Adds many sounds)
- Tectonic (Massively changes world generation with mountains and underground rivers. DOES NOT ADD BIOMES.)
- ThreadTweak (Maintained Version of Smooth Boot)
- Visuality (Adds tons of different particles)
- Wakes (Adds more water effects)
- EMF (Adds support for Optifine's Custom Entity Models)
- ETF (Adds many new Entity Texture Features)


</details>



<details>
<summary>Included Shaders (4)</summary>

- [BSL Classic](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders-classic)
- [RenderPearl](https://modrinth.com/shader/renderpearl)
- [Simply Upscaled](https://modrinth.com/shader/simply-upscaled)
- [Stereo's Default+](https://modrinth.com/shader/stereos-default+)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Resource Packs (12)</summary>

- [Better Flame Particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-flame-particles)
- [Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Detailed Animations Reworked](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations)
- [Jermsy Boy's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jerms-better-leaves)
- [Low Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack)
- [Refined Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-enchants)
- [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)
- [Gui Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share/#CEmMyu)
- [Vervada's Enhanced Plants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-plants)
- [Watch of Undying](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/watch-of-undying)
</details>
